# Oak & Pixel

> Oak & Pixel is a premium digital studio in Randburg, Gauteng, South Africa. The studio builds high-end websites, lead-generation systems, automation strategy, and digital infrastructure for ambitious brands.

## Key Links

- Homepage: https://www.oakandpixel.co.za/
- Studio brochure: https://www.oakandpixel.co.za/brochure.html
- Privacy policy: https://www.oakandpixel.co.za/privacy.html
- Terms and conditions: https://www.oakandpixel.co.za/terms.html
- Full AI context: https://www.oakandpixel.co.za/llms-full.txt

## Services

- Signature Plan: Professional digital foundation with website, booking system, appointment reminders, basic invoicing, and essential digital presence. R10,000 setup + R4,499/month.
- Growth Plan: Operations and lead-management plan with online payments, CRM, KPI dashboards, automated communications, and LeadSense Core. R18,000 setup + R6,999/month.
- Private Plan: Fully integrated growth ecosystem with Atlas AI chatbot, WhatsApp automation, client portal, advanced reporting, API integrations, process automation, and monthly optimisation consulting. R30,000 setup + R12,499/month.
- Digital Advisory Session: Focused strategic and technical advisory for prioritisation, architecture, and next steps.
